query:
SELECT 
  id,
  order_no,
  customer_name,
  salesperson_id,
  traffic_source,
  course_amount,
  payment_amount,
  teacher_fee,
  transport_fee,
  partner_fee,
  payment_channel,
  channel_order_no,
  class_date,
  delivery_city,
  delivery_teacher,
  delivery_course,
  status,
  notes
FROM orders 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 50;
